name: agent-booster-pack-proof
description_en: Proof-first Pi extension that uses a red-green-refactor cycle when behavior should be specified in tests first, with built-in parsing for popular test frameworks. Renamed from pi-proof; old name deprecated.
description_zh: 优先证明的 Pi 扩展，当行为应首先在测试中指定时使用红-绿-重构周期，内置流行测试框架的解析器。从 pi-proof 重命名；旧名称已弃用
